(a) Section 222.032 (Use of Federal Aid for Toll Bridge Construction) applies to a bridge over a stream forming the boundary of this state and an adjoining state.

(b) If the bridge is constructed jointly by this state and the adjoining state, the commission may cooperate with the appropriate authorities of the adjoining state in imposing tolls in accordance with this section.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 222. Funding & Fed. Aid
##### § 222.033 — Interstate Toll Bridges

(a) Section 222.032 (Use of Federal Aid for Toll Bridge Construction) applies to a bridge over a stream forming the boundary of this state and an adjoining state.

(b) If the bridge is constructed jointly by this state and the adjoining state, the commission may cooperate with the appropriate authorities of the adjoining state in imposing tolls in accordance with this section.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: Section 222.032 (Use of Federal Aid for Toll Bridge Construction) applies to a bridge over a stream forming the boundary of this state and an adjoining state.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: If the bridge is constructed jointly by this state and the adjoining state, the commission may cooperate with the appropriate authorities of the adjoining state in imposing tolls in accordance with this section.
